title: The Human-Centered AI Flywheel
description: A cyclical diagram illustrating the iterative, reinforcing process of designing AI systems that augment and empower human capabilities, based on Ben Shneiderman's framework.
relationships: A continuous loop where Human Needs inform AI Design, which produces an AI System whose Output is used by Humans, leading to Outcomes that are Monitored, creating Feedback that loops back to refine the AI Design to better serve Human Needs.
